message:
refactor(importlib): Implement CPython-compatible importlib modules

Implement all importlib submodules with CPython-compatible APIs:

Main modules:
- abc.zig: MetaPathFinder, PathEntryFinder, ResourceLoader, InspectLoader,
  ExecutionLoader, FileLoader, SourceLoader, Traversable
- machinery.zig: BuiltinImporter, FrozenImporter, FileFinder,
  AppleFrameworkLoader, NamespaceLoader, SOURCE_SUFFIXES, BYTECODE_SUFFIXES
- util.zig: MAGIC_NUMBER, findSpec, moduleFromSpec, specFromLoader,
  cacheFromSource, sourceFromCache, LazyLoader
- resources.zig: Package, Anchor, ResourceReader, Traversable, files(),
  contents(), isResource(), openBinary/Text(), readBinary/Text()
- metadata.zig: Distribution, DistributionFinder, PackageMetadata,
  EntryPoint, EntryPoints, PackagePath, distribution(), version()

Submodules follow DRY pattern - re-export from parent modules:
- resources/: abc, _common, _functional, _adapters, _itertools, readers, simple
- metadata/: _meta, _adapters, _collections, _functools, _itertools,
  _text, _typing, diagnose
- _abc, _bootstrap, _bootstrap_external, readers, simple

All modules wired up via runtime.zig Lib struct.
